title: Boxi's Unique Double Slabs
description: Combine two slabs of any material to create new variants of your favorite building blocks. These double slabs have custom original vanilla-friendly textures. Completely client-side!
body:
## 📋 ABOUT 📋

**Imagine if every slab block had one more variant.**

Unique Double Slabs transforms **every double slab** into a brand-new block with **custom textures**, expanding your building possibilities in a fully vanilla-friendly way.

## 🧱 FEATURES 🧱

- **Double slabs** have been **redesigned** into unique decorative blocks.
- **Every wooden plank** type has its **own exclusive pattern and style**, giving each one extra personality.
- Currently includes slab variants up to 1.19.4, with more blocks and updates planned over time!

## 📄 TERMS OF USE 📄

<details>
<summary>Terms Of Use</summary>

✅ You are **allowed** to:

- **Use or promote this resourcepack in videos, streams, etc.** - 
Credits will be greatly appreciated!

- **Include this resourcepack in modpacks.** - 
You are free to use it in your own modpacks, and I truly appreciate it if you do so. Please ensure the modpack is published on the same platform where this pack is available (e.g. CurseForge or Modrinth).

- **Modify this resource pack for personal use only.** - 
You may edit, tweak, or customize it however you like, as long as it's not shared, uploaded, or redistributed publicly.

❌ You are **restricted** from:

- **Redistribute this resourcepack without prior permission.** - 
This includes reuploads, mirrors, direct downloads, or ports to other platforms (such as Bedrock Edition), whether the pack is modified or unmodified.

- **Claim ownership or authorship of this resourcepack or any of its assets.** - 
You may not present this pack, or parts of it, as your own work.

</details>
